attributes.description: Single cluster deep dive with health summary, resource usage & capacity, node health, and top consumers.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), names = VALUES(k8s.cluster.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " clusters"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), names = VALUES(k8s.cluster.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " clusters"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM logs-k8seventsreceiver.otel*
| KEEP @timestamp, body.*, severity_text, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name
| SORT @timestamp DESC

FROM logs-k8seventsreceiver.otel*
| KEEP @timestamp, body.*, severity_text, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name
| SORT @timestamp DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Latest Kubernetes events (message, severity, cluster, pod, and node), sorted by time descending.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cpu, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cpu, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

embeddableConfig.description: Total allocatable CPU across all nodes in the cluster (in cores), based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_memory, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_memory, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

embeddableConfig.description: Total allocatable memory across all nodes in the cluster, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_usage = SUM(usage),
    total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, timestamp
| EVAL cpu_util = CASE(total_alloc > 0, total_usage / total_alloc, NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc, cpu_util

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_usage = SUM(usage),
    total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, timestamp
| EVAL cpu_util = CASE(total_alloc > 0, total_usage / total_alloc, NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc, cpu_util

embeddableConfig.description: Total CPU usage across all nodes vs total cluster CPU capacity (two-stage aggregation: MAX per node, then SUM across nodes).
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs cluster capacity

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL

| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc, mem_util

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    usage = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),

| STATS
    total_usage = SUM(usage),
    total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, timestamp
| EVAL mem_util = CASE(total_alloc > 0, TO_DOUBLE(total_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(total_alloc), NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc, mem_util

embeddableConfig.description: Total memory working set across all nodes vs total cluster memory capacity (two-stage aggregation: MAX per node, then SUM across nodes).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_bytes = SUM(disk_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_bytes, 4)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_bytes = SUM(disk_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_bytes, 4)
| KEEP total_gb

embeddableConfig.description: Total filesystem capacity across all nodes in the cluster, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    capacity = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_usage = SUM(usage),
    total_capacity = SUM(capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, timestamp
| EVAL disk_util = CASE(
    total_capacity > 0,
    TO_DOUBLE(total_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(total_capacity),
    NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP  timestamp, total_usage, total_capacity, disk_util

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    capacity = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_usage = SUM(usage),
    total_capacity = SUM(capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, timestamp
| EVAL disk_util = CASE(
    total_capacity > 0,
    TO_DOUBLE(total_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(total_capacity),
    NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP  timestamp, total_usage, total_capacity, disk_util

embeddableConfig.description: Total disk usage across all nodes vs total cluster disk capacity (two-stage aggregation: MAX per node, then SUM across nodes).
embeddableConfig.title: Disk usage vs cluster capacity

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Pod Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Pod Count`

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Pod Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Pod Count`

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods running over time.
embeddableConfig.title: Pod count over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    avg_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(
    avg_cap > 0,
    TO_DOUBLE(avg_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(avg_cap),
    NULL
  )
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_cap), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    avg_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(
    avg_cap > 0,
    TO_DOUBLE(avg_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(avg_cap),
    NULL
  )
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_cap), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

embeddableConfig.description: Cluster disk utilization for the selected time range. Avg is typical usage across the period. Last value is the most recent reading compared to that average

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    avg_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(
    avg_alloc > 0,
    avg_ws / avg_alloc,
    NULL
  )
| SORT timestamp
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_ws) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    avg_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(
    avg_alloc > 0,
    avg_ws / avg_alloc,
    NULL
  )
| SORT timestamp
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_ws) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

embeddableConfig.description: Last memory working set utilization value for the selected time range. "Last value vs Avg" shows how the most recent reading compares to that average

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(avg_alloc > 0, avg_usage / avg_alloc, NULL)
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(avg_alloc > 0, avg_usage / avg_alloc, NULL)
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

embeddableConfig.description:
Last CPU utilization value for the selected time range. 

"Last value vs Avg" shows how the most recent reading compares to the time range average.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of nodes in the cluster, based on distinct node names in the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

embeddableConfig.description: Number of nodes in Ready state in the cluster, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS not_ready = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS not_ready = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

embeddableConfig.description: Number of nodes that are not Ready (Not Ready or Unknown readiness) in the cluster, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 3

embeddableConfig.description: Succeeded pods (phase=3). COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 3.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
  cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
  alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_util = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, NULL)
| WHERE cpu_util IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(cpu_util), 4) BY k8s.node.name
| SORT utilization DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.node.name, utilization

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
  cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
  alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_util = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, NULL)
| WHERE cpu_util IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(cpu_util), 4) BY k8s.node.name
| SORT utilization DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.node.name, utilization

embeddableConfig.description: CPU utilization per node as bar chart. sum(k8s.node.cpu.usage) / sum(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) by node.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by CPU utilization

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL

  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
  mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),

| WHERE mem_util IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(mem_util), 4) BY k8s.node.name
| SORT utilization DESC

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*

  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
  mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
  alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_util = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), NULL)
| WHERE mem_util IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(mem_util), 4) BY k8s.node.name
| SORT utilization DESC

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    ready_val     = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready),
    mem_press_val = MAX(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure),
    mem_available = AVG(k8s.node.memory.available),
    cpu_usage     = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu     = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws        = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem     = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    fs_usage      = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap        = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    pods          = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    ready = CASE(
      ready_val == 1, "Ready",
      ready_val == 0, "Not Ready",
      ready_val == -1, "Unknown",
      "Unknown"),
    mem_pressure = CASE(
      mem_press_val == 0, "No",
      mem_press_val == 1, "Yes",
      "Unknown"),
    cpu_util  = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4),
    mem_util  = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, ready, mem_pressure, pods, cpu_util, mem_util, disk_util, mem_available, k8s.cluster.name
| SORT cpu_util DESC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    ready_val     = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready),
    mem_press_val = MAX(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure),
    mem_available = AVG(k8s.node.memory.available),
    cpu_usage     = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu     = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws        = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem     = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    fs_usage      = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap        = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    pods          = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    ready = CASE(
      ready_val == 1, "Ready",
      ready_val == 0, "Not Ready",
      ready_val == -1, "Unknown",
      "Unknown"),
    mem_pressure = CASE(
      mem_press_val == 0, "No",
      mem_press_val == 1, "Yes",
      "Unknown"),
    cpu_util  = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4),
    mem_util  = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, ready, mem_pressure, pods, cpu_util, mem_util, disk_util, mem_available, k8s.cluster.name
| SORT cpu_util DESC

embeddableConfig.description:
Summary per node. Click a node name to drill down. 

Ready status and memory pressure reflect the current state. Pod count, memory available and disk utilization are the latest values. 

CPU and memory working set utilization are averaged over the selected time range.
embeddableConfig.title: Nodes

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.name
| WHERE k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    restarts  = MAX(restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT cpu_usage DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.name
| WHERE k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    restarts  = MAX(restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT cpu_usage DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description:
Top 10 pods in this cluster, ranked by average CPU utilization over the selected time range. 

Click a pod name to drill into pod details, or a namespace to drill into namespace details. 

Restarts = sum across all containers for that pod. CPU usage is averaged over the selected time range
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by CPU usage

Top 10 pods in this cluster, ranked by average memory working set over the selected time range. 

Click a pod name to drill into pod details, or a namespace to drill into namespace details.

Memory working set is averaged over the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
| EVAL container_id = CONCAT(k8s.pod.uid, ":", k8s.container.name)
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY container_id
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS container_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(container_id)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
| EVAL container_id = CONCAT(k8s.pod.uid, ":", k8s.container.name)
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY container_id
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS container_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(container_id)

embeddableConfig.description: Container count in this cluster. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.container.name).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_cpu = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage) BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS ns_cpu = SUM(pod_cpu) BY k8s.namespace.name
| SORT ns_cpu DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, ns_cpu

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_cpu = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage) BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS ns_cpu = SUM(pod_cpu) BY k8s.namespace.name
| SORT ns_cpu DESC
| LIMIT 10

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL)
| EVAL is_deploy = CASE(k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
| INLINE STATS latest_deploy_ts = MAX(CASE(is_deploy == 1, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL keep = CASE(
    is_deploy == 1 AND @timestamp == latest_deploy_ts, 1,
    is_deploy == 0, 1,
    0)
| WHERE keep == 1
| STATS
    max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    available    = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired      = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS
    restarts  = SUM(max_restarts),
    available = MAX(available),
    desired   = MAX(desired)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL)
| EVAL is_deploy = CASE(k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
| INLINE STATS latest_deploy_ts = MAX(CASE(is_deploy == 1, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL keep = CASE(
    is_deploy == 1 AND @timestamp == latest_deploy_ts, 1,
    is_deploy == 0, 1,
    0)
| WHERE keep == 1
| STATS
    max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    available    = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired      = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS
    restarts  = SUM(max_restarts),
    available = MAX(available),
    desired   = MAX(desired)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description:
Top 10 deployments in this cluster, ranked by total container restarts in the selected time range. 

Click a deployment name to drill into deployment details, or a namespace to drill into namespace details. 

Restarts = sum across all containers and pods for that deployment. Available and Desired reflect current replica counts
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 deployments by container restarts

attributes.title: [Kubernetes OTel] Cluster Detail
